subject: Merge OpenTargets drug_molecule
description: Merge cached OpenTargets drug_molecule into molecule nodes using scratch-first local KG copy, validate zero dangling edges, then promote if validated.
result: Merged cached OpenTargets drug_molecule into nodes/molecule.parquet. Added/enriched 22,230 ChEMBL records with drug_type/is_approved/inchikey/smiles and 19,100 DrugBank IDs; row count remains 31,007 because endpoints already existed. GCS validate PASS: 3,205,619 nodes, 25,035,369 edges, total_dangling_edges=0, peak RSS about 6.2G.
